purpose: Reference for the Project Knowledge Index (PKI) -- a persistent, auto-accumulating knowledge layer at {project_root}/.synapse/knowledge/. Covers getting-started bootstrap, lifecycle architecture (BOOTSTRAP/ACCUMULATE/REFRESH/CONSUME), directory structure (manifest.json, annotations/, insights/, domains.json, patterns.json, queries/), five population mechanisms (!learn, worker annotations, staleness hook, !learn_update, post-swarm extraction), retrieval and consumption (worker retrieval + PromptBuilder injection), and master pre-planning integration.
gotchas: PKI is auto-maintained -- workers mark stale via PostToolUse hook on file writes
Hash key for annotations = first 8 chars of SHA-256 of relative path
PromptBuilder.readPKIKnowledge() auto-injects into worker prompts during GUI swarms
Stale annotations remain usable but flagged with caveats
When >50 files need re-annotation, !learn_update suggests full !learn rebuild
Post-swarm knowledge extraction runs at Step 17G of completion protocol
PKI gets smarter every swarm -- feedback loop
patterns: Two-tier knowledge: per-file annotations + swarm-level insights
Domain/tag/concept indexes route queries to relevant annotations
Master pre-planning injection: gotchas > patterns > relationships > conventions priority on trim
PKI Quick-Route: !context queries PKI before falling back to grep/glob
conventions: Annotations include: purpose, exports, imports, gotchas, patterns, conventions, relationships, domain, tags, complexity
Insights labeled by date and slug: {date}_{slug}.json
PKI items prefixed [PKI] in worker prompts
